sections.paragraph:
Original: קסם

Transliteration: qâsam

Phonetic: kaw-sam'

BDB Definition:

  1. (Qal) to practice divination, divine
    1. of diviners of the nations, Balaam
    2. of false prophets of Israel
    3. prohibited

Origin: a primitive root

TWOT entry: 2044

Part(s) of speech: Verb
